title: polygala pumila
intro: Polygala pumila, also known as Dwarf Polygala, is a perennial plant native to Europe and Asia, belonging to the Polygalaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polygala pumila are attributed to its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be consumed as a raw supplement or added to skincare products for its potential skin-soothing properties.
